title: F1 Standings Web App Implementation

steps.description:
Implement the full feature in main.go — single-binary go project

Feature requirements: build a Go web application that fetches and displays F1 race standings from the Ergast API, showing current season driver standings with position, points, wins, and team name in a clean HTML table served at localhost:8080
steps.done_condition: main.go compiles and fully implements: build a Go web application that fetches and displays F1 race standings from the Ergast API, showing current season driver standings with position, points, wins, and team name in a clean HTML table served at localhost:8080; go.mod has correct dependencies

riskRegister.mitigation: Use go mod tidy after each phase

successCriteria: Application serves HTML table at localhost:8080
DriverStanding struct contains position, points, wins, and teamName
UseCase returns valid data from Ergast API
